$comment: Manually-curated weekly recurring events. The manual-recurring adapter materializes the next N occurrences of each entry as concrete dated events. Edit this file and re-run `npm run ingest` to refresh.

events.title: Mah Jongg in the Garden at Elm Bank
events.description: Drop-in mah jongg in the Crockett Garden. Garden season only. Explicitly not instructional — working knowledge assumed.

events.title: Mah Jongg Club at Sherborn Library
events.description: All levels welcome. Call 508-653-0770 on your first visit.

events.title: Mah Jongg at Caryl Center
events.description: Drop-in mah jongg in Room 108. Call the Dover Council on Aging to confirm during the renovation.

events.title: Pick-up Mahjong at Tolles Parsons Center
events.description: Drop-in mahjong at the Wellesley Council on Aging. 781-235-3961 to confirm day/time.

events.title: Mahjong at Sherborn COA
events.description: Weekly mahjong in the Select Board Room. Email coaprograms@sherbornma.org or call 508-651-7858.
events.venue: Sherborn Town Hall - Select Board Room

events.title: MahJong at Dedham Ames Senior Center
Beyond Beginner Mah Jongg (JCC Greater Boston)
events.description: Designed for players past the basics — supervised play with focus on hand selection and pacing. Non-members welcome. Email adultprog@jccgb.org for upcoming sessions.

events.title: Guided Mah Jongg Play at Ten Trees Books
events.description: Supervised play with Christina Awad of Tile & Grace Mahjong — ask questions in the moment. Watch their events page or Eventbrite listings for confirmed dates.
